description: Small local sample ruleset for VulScan vulnerability intelligence foundation with safe version-condition examples.

rules.title: SSH Service Exposed
rules.recommendation: Ensure SSH is required, patched, and restricted to trusted networks.
rules.limitation: Service exposure alone does not confirm a vulnerability.

rules.title: OpenSSH Version Below Local Policy Example
rules.affected_versions: OpenSSH versions below 9.6 per local demonstration policy example.
rules.recommendation: Update OpenSSH according to vendor guidance and local patch policy after confirming product and version.
rules.limitation: Local demonstration rule only. Requires confirmed OpenSSH product and version evidence.
rules.detection_note: This is a local version-condition example and is not a live CVE assertion.

rules.title: Apache HTTP Server Version Below Local Policy Example
rules.affected_versions: Apache HTTP Server versions below 2.4.58 per local demonstration policy example.
rules.recommendation: Update Apache HTTP Server according to vendor guidance after confirming the exact product and version.
rules.limitation: Local demonstration rule only. Requires confirmed Apache HTTP Server version.
rules.detection_note: This is a local version-condition example and is not a live CVE assertion.

rules.title: Nginx Version Below Local Policy Example
rules.affected_versions: Nginx versions below 1.24.0 per local demonstration policy example.
rules.recommendation: Update Nginx according to vendor guidance after confirming the exact product and version.
rules.limitation: Local demonstration rule only. Requires confirmed Nginx version.
rules.detection_note: This is a local version-condition example and is not a live CVE assertion.

rules.title: SMB Service Exposed
rules.recommendation: Restrict SMB to trusted internal networks and block it from untrusted networks.
rules.limitation: SMB exposure does not confirm a vulnerability.

rules.title: RDP Service Exposed
rules.recommendation: Restrict RDP using VPN, firewall rules, or trusted IP allow lists and ensure hosts are patched.
rules.limitation: RDP exposure does not confirm a vulnerability.

rules.title: WinRM Service Exposed
rules.recommendation: Restrict WinRM to trusted management hosts and use secure authentication and transport settings.
rules.limitation: WinRM exposure does not confirm a vulnerability.

rules.title: FTP Service Exposed
rules.recommendation: Disable FTP where possible or replace it with SFTP or FTPS.
rules.limitation: FTP exposure indicates cleartext service risk but does not confirm credential exposure.

rules.title: Telnet Service Exposed
rules.recommendation: Disable Telnet and use SSH or another encrypted management protocol.
rules.limitation: Telnet exposure indicates cleartext management risk but does not confirm active credential compromise.

rules.title: HTTP Service Detected
rules.recommendation: Ensure the HTTP service is intended to be exposed and review passive web security headers where authorised.
rules.limitation: HTTP service detection alone does not confirm a vulnerability.

rules.title: HTTPS Service Detected
rules.recommendation: Ensure the HTTPS service is intended to be exposed and validate TLS configuration using authorised checks.
rules.limitation: HTTPS service detection alone does not confirm a vulnerability.
